contents: (** This file defines the kernel of a homomorphism [cong_ker], the

image of a homomorphism [in_image_hom], and it proves the first
    isomorphism theorem [isomorphic_first_isomorphism]. The first
    identification theorem [id_first_isomorphism] follows. *)

Require Import
  Basics.Notations
  HSet
  Colimits.Quotient
  Classes.interfaces.canonical_names
  Classes.theory.ua_isomorphic
  Classes.theory.ua_subalgebra
  Classes.theory.ua_quotient_algebra.

(** The following section defines the kernel of a homomorphism
    [cong_ker], and shows that it is a congruence.*)

Definition cong_ker (s : Sort σ) : Relation (A s)
    := λ (x y : A s), f s x = f s y.

(* Leave the following results about [cong_ker] opaque because they
   are h-props. *)

#[export] Instance equiv_rel_ker (s : Sort σ)
    : EquivRel (cong_ker s).

goals.conclusion: EquivRel (cong_ker s)

hypotheses.type: forall s0 : Sort σ, A s0 -> B s0

goals.conclusion: EquivRel (cong_ker s)

hypotheses.type: forall s0 : Sort σ, A s0 -> B s0

goals.conclusion: Symmetric (cong_ker s)

hypotheses.type: forall s0 : Sort σ, A s0 -> B s0

goals.conclusion: Transitive (cong_ker s)

hypotheses.type: forall s0 : Sort σ, A s0 -> B s0

goals.conclusion: Symmetric (cong_ker s)

hypotheses.type: forall s0 : Sort σ, A s0 -> B s0

goals.conclusion: cong_ker s x y -> cong_ker s y x

hypotheses.type: forall s0 : Sort σ, A s0 -> B s0

goals.conclusion: Transitive (cong_ker s)

hypotheses.type: forall s0 : Sort σ, A s0 -> B s0

goals.conclusion: cong_ker s x y -> cong_ker s y z -> cong_ker s x z

hypotheses.type: forall s0 : Sort σ, A s0 -> B s0

    : ap_operation β (map_family_prod f a)
      = ap_operation β (map_family_prod f b).

#[export] Instance is_congruence_ker : IsCongruence A cong_ker
    := BuildIsCongruence A cong_ker.

(** The next section defines an "in image predicate", [in_image_hom].
    It gives rise to the homomorphic image of a homomorphism. *)

Definition in_image_hom (s : Sort σ) (y : B s) : HProp
    := merely (hfiber (f s) y).

goals.conclusion: ClosedUnderOp B (λ (s : Sort σ) (y : B s), in_image_hom s y) β

hypotheses.type: forall s : Sort σ, A s -> B s

goals.conclusion: ClosedUnderOp B (λ (s : Sort σ) (y : B s), in_image_hom s y) β

hypotheses.type: forall s : Sort σ, A s -> B s

goals.conclusion: ClosedUnderOp B (λ (s : Sort σ) (y : B s), in_image_hom s y) β

hypotheses.type: forall s : Sort σ, A s -> B s

goals.conclusion: ClosedUnderOp B (λ (s : Sort σ) (y : B s), in_image_hom s y) β

forall (α0 : Operation A w) (β0 : Operation B w),
OpPreserving f α0 β0 ->
ClosedUnderOp B (λ (s : Sort σ) (y : B s), in_image_hom s y) β0

goals.conclusion: ClosedUnderOp B (λ (s : Sort σ) (y : B s), in_image_hom s y) β

contents:
#[export] Instance is_subalgebra_predicate_in_image_hom
    : IsSubalgebraPredicate B in_image_hom
    := BuildIsSubalgebraPredicate is_closed_under_ops_in_image_hom.

(** The following section proves the first isomorphism theorem,
    [isomorphic_first_isomorphism] and the first identification
    theorem [id_first_isomorphism]. *)

(** The homomorphism [def_first_isomorphism] is informally given by

<<
      def_first_isomorphism s (class_of _ x) := f s x.
>>
*)

Definition def_first_isomorphism (s : Sort σ)
    : (A / cong_ker f) s → (B && in_image_hom f) s.

goals.conclusion:
(A / cong_ker f) s ->
(B && (λ (s0 : Sort σ) (y : B s0), in_image_hom f s0 y)) s

hypotheses.type: forall s0 : Sort σ, A s0 -> B s0

goals.conclusion:
(A / cong_ker f) s ->
(B && (λ (s0 : Sort σ) (y : B s0), in_image_hom f s0 y)) s

hypotheses.type: forall s0 : Sort σ, A s0 -> B s0

contents: refine (Quotient_rec (cong_ker f s) _ (λ x, (f s x; tr (x; idpath))) _).

goals.conclusion: forall a b : A s, cong_ker f s a b -> (f s a; tr (a; 1)) = (f s b; tr (b; 1))

hypotheses.type: forall s0 : Sort σ, A s0 -> B s0

goals.conclusion: (f s x; tr (x; 1)) = (f s y; tr (y; 1))

hypotheses.type: forall s0 : Sort σ, A s0 -> B s0

contents:
Lemma oppreserving_first_isomorphism {w : SymbolType σ}
    (α : Operation A w)
    (β : Operation B w)
    (γ : Operation (A / cong_ker f) w)
    (C : ClosedUnderOp B (in_image_hom f) β)
    (P : OpPreserving f α β)
    (G : ComputeOpQuotient A (cong_ker f) α γ)
    : OpPreserving def_first_isomorphism γ
        (op_subalgebra B (in_image_hom f) β C).

goals.conclusion:
OpPreserving def_first_isomorphism γ
  (op_subalgebra B (λ (s : Sort σ) (y : B s), in_image_hom f s y) β C)

hypotheses.type: forall s : Sort σ, A s -> B s
ClosedUnderOp B (λ (s : Sort σ) (y : B s), in_image_hom f s y) β

goals.conclusion:
OpPreserving def_first_isomorphism γ
  (op_subalgebra B (λ (s : Sort σ) (y : B s), in_image_hom f s y) β C)

hypotheses.type: forall s : Sort σ, A s -> B s
ClosedUnderOp B (λ (s : Sort σ) (y : B s), in_image_hom f s y) β

goals.conclusion:
OpPreserving def_first_isomorphism γ
  (op_subalgebra B (λ (s : Sort σ) (y : B s), in_image_hom f s y) β C)

hypotheses.type: forall s : Sort σ, A s -> B s
ClosedUnderOp B (λ (s : Sort σ) (y : B s), in_image_hom f s y) β

goals.conclusion:
OpPreserving def_first_isomorphism γ
  (op_subalgebra B (λ (s : Sort σ) (y : B s), in_image_hom f s y) β C)

hypotheses.type: forall s : Sort σ, A s -> B s
ClosedUnderOp B (λ (s : Sort σ) (y : B s), in_image_hom f s y) β

forall (α0 : Operation A w) (β0 : Operation B w)
(γ0 : Operation (A / cong_ker f) w)
(C0 : ClosedUnderOp B (λ (s : Sort σ) (y : B s), in_image_hom f s y) β0),
OpPreserving f α0 β0 ->
ComputeOpQuotient A (cong_ker f) α0 γ0 ->
OpPreserving def_first_isomorphism γ0
  (op_subalgebra B (λ (s : Sort σ) (y : B s), in_image_hom f s y) β0 C0)

goals.conclusion:
OpPreserving def_first_isomorphism γ
  (op_subalgebra B (λ (s : Sort σ) (y : B s), in_image_hom f s y) β C)

hypotheses.type: forall s : Sort σ, A s -> B s
ClosedUnderOp B (λ (s : Sort σ) (y : B s), in_image_hom f s y) β

goals.conclusion:
(def_first_isomorphism t γ).1 =
(op_subalgebra B (λ (s : Sort σ) (y : B s), in_image_hom f s y) β C).1

hypotheses.type: forall s : Sort σ, A s -> B s
ClosedUnderOp B (λ (s : Sort σ) (y : B s), in_image_hom f s y) β

goals.conclusion:
forall γ : Operation (A / cong_ker f) (ne_list.one t),
ComputeOpQuotient A (cong_ker f) α γ ->
(def_first_isomorphism t γ).1 =
(op_subalgebra B (λ (s : Sort σ) (y : B s), in_image_hom f s y) β C).1

hypotheses.type: forall s : Sort σ, A s -> B s
ClosedUnderOp B (λ (s : Sort σ) (y : B s), in_image_hom f s y) β

goals.conclusion:
forall a : A t,
ComputeOpQuotient A (cong_ker f) α (class_of (cong_ker f t) a) ->
(def_first_isomorphism t (class_of (cong_ker f t) a)).1 =
(op_subalgebra B (λ (s : Sort σ) (y : B s), in_image_hom f s y) β C).1

hypotheses.type: forall s : Sort σ, A s -> B s
ClosedUnderOp B (λ (s : Sort σ) (y : B s), in_image_hom f s y) β

goals.conclusion:
(def_first_isomorphism t (class_of (cong_ker f t) x)).1 =
(op_subalgebra B (λ (s : Sort σ) (y : B s), in_image_hom f s y) β C).1

hypotheses.type: forall s : Sort σ, A s -> B s
ClosedUnderOp B (λ (s : Sort σ) (y : B s), in_image_hom f s y) β
ComputeOpQuotient A (cong_ker f) α (class_of (cong_ker f t) x)

goals.conclusion:
(def_first_isomorphism t (class_of (cong_ker f t) x)).1 =
(op_subalgebra B (λ (s : Sort σ) (y : B s), in_image_hom f s y) (f t α) C).1

hypotheses.type: forall s : Sort σ, A s -> B s
ClosedUnderOp B (λ (s : Sort σ) (y : B s), in_image_hom f s y) (f t α)
ComputeOpQuotient A (cong_ker f) α (class_of (cong_ker f t) x)

goals.conclusion:
OpPreserving def_first_isomorphism γ
  (op_subalgebra B (λ (s : Sort σ) (y : B s), in_image_hom f s y) β C)

hypotheses.type: forall s : Sort σ, A s -> B s
ClosedUnderOp B (λ (s : Sort σ) (y : B s), in_image_hom f s y) β

forall (α0 : Operation A w) (β0 : Operation B w)
(γ0 : Operation (A / cong_ker f) w)
(C0 : ClosedUnderOp B (λ (s : Sort σ) (y : B s), in_image_hom f s y) β0),
OpPreserving f α0 β0 ->
ComputeOpQuotient A (cong_ker f) α0 γ0 ->
OpPreserving def_first_isomorphism γ0
  (op_subalgebra B (λ (s : Sort σ) (y : B s), in_image_hom f s y) β0 C0)

goals.conclusion:
forall a : A t,
(fix OpPreserving (w0 : SymbolType σ) :
     Operation (A / cong_ker f) w0 ->
     Operation (B && (λ (s : Sort σ) (y : B s), in_image_hom f s y)) w0 ->
     Type :=
   match
     w0 as w1
     return
       (Operation (A / cong_ker f) w1 ->
        Operation (B && (λ (s : Sort σ) (y : B s), in_image_hom f s y)) w1 ->
        Type)
   with
   | ne_list.one s =>
       λ (α0 : Operation (A / cong_ker f) (ne_list.one s))
       (β0 : Operation
               (B && (λ (s0 : Sort σ) (y : B s0), in_image_hom f s0 y))
               (ne_list.one s)),
       def_first_isomorphism s α0 = β0
   | ne_list.cons s y =>
       λ (α0 : Operation (A / cong_ker f) (ne_list.cons s y))
       (β0 : Operation
               (B && (λ (s0 : Sort σ) (y0 : B s0), in_image_hom f s0 y0))
               (ne_list.cons s y)),
       forall x : (A / cong_ker f) s,
       OpPreserving y (α0 x) (β0 (def_first_isomorphism s x))
   end)
  w (γ (class_of (cong_ker f t) a))
  (op_subalgebra B (λ (s : Sort σ) (y : B s), in_image_hom f s y) β C
     (def_first_isomorphism t (class_of (cong_ker f t) a)))

hypotheses.type: forall s : Sort σ, A s -> B s
ClosedUnderOp B (λ (s : Sort σ) (y : B s), in_image_hom f s y) β

forall (α0 : Operation A w) (β0 : Operation B w)
(γ0 : Operation (A / cong_ker f) w)
(C0 : ClosedUnderOp B (λ (s : Sort σ) (y : B s), in_image_hom f s y) β0),
OpPreserving f α0 β0 ->
ComputeOpQuotient A (cong_ker f) α0 γ0 ->
OpPreserving def_first_isomorphism γ0
  (op_subalgebra B (λ (s : Sort σ) (y : B s), in_image_hom f s y) β0 C0)

goals.conclusion:
(fix OpPreserving (w0 : SymbolType σ) :
     Operation (A / cong_ker f) w0 ->
     Operation (B && (λ (s : Sort σ) (y : B s), in_image_hom f s y)) w0 ->
     Type :=
   match
     w0 as w1
     return
       (Operation (A / cong_ker f) w1 ->
        Operation (B && (λ (s : Sort σ) (y : B s), in_image_hom f s y)) w1 ->
        Type)
   with
   | ne_list.one s =>
       λ (α0 : Operation (A / cong_ker f) (ne_list.one s))
       (β0 : Operation
               (B && (λ (s0 : Sort σ) (y : B s0), in_image_hom f s0 y))
               (ne_list.one s)),
       def_first_isomorphism s α0 = β0
   | ne_list.cons s y =>
       λ (α0 : Operation (A / cong_ker f) (ne_list.cons s y))
       (β0 : Operation
               (B && (λ (s0 : Sort σ) (y0 : B s0), in_image_hom f s0 y0))
               (ne_list.cons s y)),
       forall x0 : (A / cong_ker f) s,
       OpPreserving y (α0 x0) (β0 (def_first_isomorphism s x0))
   end)
  w (γ (class_of (cong_ker f t) x))
  (op_subalgebra B (λ (s : Sort σ) (y : B s), in_image_hom f s y) β C
     (def_first_isomorphism t (class_of (cong_ker f t) x)))

hypotheses.type: forall s : Sort σ, A s -> B s
ClosedUnderOp B (λ (s : Sort σ) (y : B s), in_image_hom f s y) β

forall (α0 : Operation A w) (β0 : Operation B w)
(γ0 : Operation (A / cong_ker f) w)
(C0 : ClosedUnderOp B (λ (s : Sort σ) (y : B s), in_image_hom f s y) β0),
OpPreserving f α0 β0 ->
ComputeOpQuotient A (cong_ker f) α0 γ0 ->
OpPreserving def_first_isomorphism γ0
  (op_subalgebra B (λ (s : Sort σ) (y : B s), in_image_hom f s y) β0 C0)

goals.conclusion: OpPreserving f (α x) (β (f t x))

hypotheses.type: forall s : Sort σ, A s -> B s
ClosedUnderOp B (λ (s : Sort σ) (y : B s), in_image_hom f s y) β

forall (α0 : Operation A w) (β0 : Operation B w)
(γ0 : Operation (A / cong_ker f) w)
(C0 : ClosedUnderOp B (λ (s : Sort σ) (y : B s), in_image_hom f s y) β0),
OpPreserving f α0 β0 ->
ComputeOpQuotient A (cong_ker f) α0 γ0 ->
OpPreserving def_first_isomorphism γ0
  (op_subalgebra B (λ (s : Sort σ) (y : B s), in_image_hom f s y) β0 C0)

goals.conclusion: ComputeOpQuotient A (cong_ker f) (α x) (γ (class_of (cong_ker f t) x))

hypotheses.type: forall s : Sort σ, A s -> B s
ClosedUnderOp B (λ (s : Sort σ) (y : B s), in_image_hom f s y) β

forall (α0 : Operation A w) (β0 : Operation B w)
(γ0 : Operation (A / cong_ker f) w)
(C0 : ClosedUnderOp B (λ (s : Sort σ) (y : B s), in_image_hom f s y) β0),
OpPreserving f α0 β0 ->
ComputeOpQuotient A (cong_ker f) α0 γ0 ->
OpPreserving def_first_isomorphism γ0
  (op_subalgebra B (λ (s : Sort σ) (y : B s), in_image_hom f s y) β0 C0)

goals.conclusion: OpPreserving f (α x) (β (f t x))

hypotheses.type: forall s : Sort σ, A s -> B s
ClosedUnderOp B (λ (s : Sort σ) (y : B s), in_image_hom f s y) β

forall (α0 : Operation A w) (β0 : Operation B w)
(γ0 : Operation (A / cong_ker f) w)
(C0 : ClosedUnderOp B (λ (s : Sort σ) (y : B s), in_image_hom f s y) β0),
OpPreserving f α0 β0 ->
ComputeOpQuotient A (cong_ker f) α0 γ0 ->
OpPreserving def_first_isomorphism γ0
  (op_subalgebra B (λ (s : Sort σ) (y : B s), in_image_hom f s y) β0 C0)

goals.conclusion: ComputeOpQuotient A (cong_ker f) (α x) (γ (class_of (cong_ker f t) x))

hypotheses.type: forall s : Sort σ, A s -> B s

contents:
Definition hom_first_isomorphism
    : Homomorphism (A / cong_ker f) (B && in_image_hom f)
    := BuildHomomorphism def_first_isomorphism.

#[export] Instance embedding_first_isomorphism (s : Sort σ)
    : IsEmbedding (hom_first_isomorphism s).

goals.conclusion: IsEmbedding (hom_first_isomorphism s)

forall (a : A s) (y : (A / cong_ker f) s),
hom_first_isomorphism s (class_of (cong_ker f s) a) =
hom_first_isomorphism s y -> class_of (cong_ker f s) a = y

goals.conclusion: cong_ker f s x y

hom_first_isomorphism s (class_of (cong_ker f s) x) =
hom_first_isomorphism s (class_of (cong_ker f s) y)

    theorem, where the homomorphism is surjective. *)

(** The homomorphism [hom_first_isomorphism_surjection] is the
    composition of two isomorphisms, so it is an isomorphism. *)

Definition hom_first_isomorphism_surjection
    : Homomorphism (A / cong_ker f) B
    := hom_compose
          (hom_inc_subalgebra B (in_image_hom f))
          (hom_first_isomorphism f).
Theorem isomorphic_first_isomorphism_surjection : A / cong_ker f ≅ B.

goals.conclusion: A / cong_ker f ≅ B

forall s : Sort σ, ReflectiveSubuniverse.IsConnMap (Tr (-1)) (f s)

goals.conclusion: A / cong_ker f = B

contents:
(** The next section specializes the first isomorphism theorem to the
    case where the homomorphism is injective. It proves that an
    injective homomorphism is an isomorphism between its domain
    and its image. *)

goals.conclusion: IsIsomorphism (hom_quotient (cong_ker f))

hypotheses.type: forall s : Sort σ, A s -> B s
forall s : Sort σ, IsInjective (f s)

goals.conclusion: IsIsomorphism (hom_quotient (cong_ker f))

hypotheses.type: forall s : Sort σ, A s -> B s
forall s : Sort σ, IsInjective (f s)

goals.conclusion: forall (s : Sort σ) (x y : A s), cong_ker f s x y -> x = y

hypotheses.type: forall s : Sort σ, A s -> B s
forall s : Sort σ, IsInjective (f s)

goals.conclusion: x = y

hypotheses.type: forall s0 : Sort σ, A s0 -> B s0
forall s0 : Sort σ, IsInjective (f s0)

contents:
(** The homomorphism [hom_first_isomorphism_inj] is the
    composition of two isomorphisms, so it is an isomorphism. *)

Definition hom_first_isomorphism_inj
    : Homomorphism A (B && in_image_hom f)
    := hom_compose
          (hom_first_isomorphism f)
          (hom_quotient (cong_ker f)).

Definition isomorphic_first_isomorphism_inj : A ≅ B && in_image_hom f
    := BuildIsomorphic hom_first_isomorphism_inj.

Definition id_first_isomorphism_inj : A = B && in_image_hom f
    := id_isomorphic isomorphic_first_isomorphism_inj.
